reason: WINDRUSH LINE: Tuesday 14 and Wednesday 15 June, after 2315 each evening, no service between Surrey Quays and Clapham Junction / Battersea Park. Use local bus route 35 (for Denmark Hill, Brixton, Clapham High Street and Clapham Junction); bus route 37 (for Peckham Rye, Brixton, Clapham High Street and Clapham Junction); and bus route 381 (for Surrey Quays, South Bermondsey, Queens Road Peckham and Peckham Rye). For Wandsworth Road, use Clapham High Street, which is a short walk away.
